full_text:
Liu Can (Zhengming)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Can, styledZhengming, was born in Changshan in Kuaiji. Helped defeat Wei Qin but killed when fighting Jiang Ban. Liu Can was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
